criteria.text: /auth/qbo redirects to Intuit authorize: response_type=code, scope com.intuit.quickbooks.accounting, configured redirect_uri; no client id -> setup message, no crash
/auth/qbo/callback exchanges code+realmId server-side, stores refreshToken+realmId on visitor session only; code/tokens/secret never sent to browser
qboToken() mints ~1h access token from refresh token, reuses until ~60s before expiry, captures rotated refresh token
read-only: QBO client issues only GET /v3/company/{realmId}/query; no write verbs on accounting entities
client id/secret and tokens never in logs/error responses; QBO connect/callback audited at HTTP layer (method path -> status, no secret values)
